features.name: non_ansi_task_port_redeclare_with_different_type
features.description: Code should include a non-ANSI task port declaration where the same port name is redeclared with a different data type
features.snippet: task t; string x; input logic x; endtask

features.name: non_ansi_module_port_with_data_type_redeclare
features.description: Code should include a non-ANSI module input port with explicit data type that is redeclared as a wire
features.snippet: module M; input integer x; wire integer x; endmodule

features.name: ansi_port_implicit_data_type_redeclare
features.description: Code should include an ANSI-style module port with implicit data type that is redeclared as a reg variable
features.snippet: module M(output [1:0] x); reg [1:0] x; endmodule

features.name: vector_signal_scalar_task_port
features.description: Code should include a non-ANSI task port with scalar declaration that is later declared as a vector signal
features.snippet: task t; input x; reg [7:0] x; endtask
